Title: DATA-101 Event Taxonomy v1 + Tracking Spec
Description: Define product-wide event taxonomy with required payload fields, naming conventions, and ownership.
AcceptanceCriteria: Event catalog includes at least 25 events with definitions and owners.

Title: DATA-102 Client Tracking SDK Integration
Description: Implement client tracking utility and wire Home/Details/Read/Pricing events with user/session context.
AcceptanceCriteria: Core flow event coverage exceeds 95%.

Title: DATA-103 Analytics Ingestion + Storage
Description: Build ingestion endpoint with schema validation and reliable analytics storage.
AcceptanceCriteria: Invalid payloads are rejected and logged; valid events are persisted.

Title: DATA-104 KPI Dashboard v1 (Internal)
Description: Create internal KPI dashboard for DAU, WAU, D1, and key funnel metrics with daily refresh.
AcceptanceCriteria: Team can view daily KPI metrics in one dashboard.

Title: CRE-201 Writer Landing + Apply Flow
Description: Launch writer landing and application flow with submission status.
AcceptanceCriteria: Applicants can submit and track application status.

Title: CRE-202 Story Creation Wizard v2
Description: Simplify first story creation flow with required validation and category presets.
AcceptanceCriteria: New writer can publish first story within 15 minutes.

Title: CRE-203 Chapter Autosave + Recovery
Description: Add autosave and draft recovery to prevent content loss.
AcceptanceCriteria: Writer can recover recent draft after tab/browser interruption.

Title: CRE-204 Publish Workflow Hardening
Description: Harden draft/publish workflow with state guards and clear failure handling.
AcceptanceCriteria: Published content appears to readers immediately with correct status.

Title: READ-301 Home Rails: New/Popular/Trending
Description: Create three reader rails with robust loading/empty states and cache.
AcceptanceCriteria: Home shows all rails reliably even when one rail is empty.

Title: READ-302 Ranking Service v1
Description: Implement ranking score using views, likes, and recency with refresh job.
AcceptanceCriteria: Ranking updates daily and aligns with scoring formula.

Title: READ-303 Search + Filter
Description: Ship search and filters for category, completion status, and length.
AcceptanceCriteria: Filtered results match selected criteria and URL state is shareable.

Title: READ-304 Pagination/Infinite Load
Description: Add cursor pagination and infinite loading with duplicate guards.
AcceptanceCriteria: Large lists load smoothly with no duplicate records.

Title: LOOP-401 Follow Author/Story Data Model
Description: Add follow schema with uniqueness constraints and migration.
AcceptanceCriteria: Repeated follow actions do not create duplicate rows.

Title: LOOP-402 Follow/Unfollow UI + API
Description: Implement follow/unfollow actions with optimistic updates and auth guards.
AcceptanceCriteria: UI and DB follow state stay synchronized.

Title: LOOP-403 In-app Notification Center v1
Description: Build in-app notification inbox with unread counters and mark-as-read.
AcceptanceCriteria: Users can view and mark notifications as read.

Title: LOOP-404 New Chapter Notification Trigger
Description: Trigger fanout notifications to followers on chapter publish with retries.
AcceptanceCriteria: Followers receive new chapter notifications consistently.

Title: WRT-501 Writer Metrics Pipeline
Description: Build daily rollups for writer/story/chapter metrics with consistency checks.
AcceptanceCriteria: Aggregated metrics match raw source data.

Title: WRT-502 Writer Dashboard v2
Description: Deliver writer dashboard with overview cards, trends, and top stories.
AcceptanceCriteria: Writers can see weekly and monthly performance quickly.

Title: WRT-503 Episode Performance Page
Description: Add per-episode performance page with comparisons and date ranges.
AcceptanceCriteria: Writers can identify top and underperforming episodes.

Title: WRT-504 Actionable Insight Widget
Description: Show rule-based, data-driven suggestions for publish cadence and content improvement.
AcceptanceCriteria: At least three actionable insight types are visible from real data.

Title: MOD-601 Report Content/Comment Flow
Description: Enable content/comment reporting with reason taxonomy and anti-spam guardrails.
AcceptanceCriteria: Reports include enough context for moderation action.

Title: MOD-602 Admin Moderation Queue
Description: Build admin moderation queue with filters, assignee, and case status.
AcceptanceCriteria: Moderators can triage and close cases efficiently.

Title: MOD-603 Moderation Actions + Audit Log
Description: Add hide/unpublish/warn actions and immutable audit trail.
AcceptanceCriteria: Every moderation action is fully traceable by actor, time, and reason.

Title: MOD-604 SLA + Alert for Reports
Description: Add SLA timers and overdue alerts for moderation tickets.
AcceptanceCriteria: Overdue reports generate alerts automatically.

Title: PAY-701 Premium Chapter Lock/Unlock
Description: Implement premium chapter paywall and unlock flow via coins.
AcceptanceCriteria: Unlocked chapters are accessible immediately in all sessions.

Title: PAY-702 Wallet Ledger + History UI
Description: Implement wallet ledger and transaction history with strict balance consistency.
AcceptanceCriteria: Displayed balance always equals ledger sum.

Title: PAY-703 Checkout-Webhooks Reconciliation
Description: Implement idempotent checkout/webhook handling with reconciliation jobs.
AcceptanceCriteria: Wallet credits reconcile with payments above 98% accuracy.

Title: PAY-704 Creator Revenue Share Ledger v1
Description: Build revenue-share ledger and statement export for creators.
AcceptanceCriteria: Statements are generated and auditable per payout cycle.

Title: OPT-801 A/B Test Framework (Home CTA)
Description: Ship lightweight experiment framework for Home CTA with exposure/result tracking.
AcceptanceCriteria: At least one CTA experiment can run end-to-end.

Title: OPT-802 Performance Pass (Home/Read)
Description: Optimize Home and Read performance through query, loading, and bundle improvements.
AcceptanceCriteria: LCP and TTFB improve against agreed baseline.

Title: OPT-803 Weekly Content Campaign Toolkit
Description: Build campaign toolkit for weekly editorial pushes without core code changes.
AcceptanceCriteria: Team can launch a weekly campaign using config only.

Title: OPT-804 Launch Checklist + Runbook
Description: Document deployment checklist, rollback SOP, and incident escalation runbook.
AcceptanceCriteria: Team passes deployment and rollback dry run using runbook.
